judgment.summary: A company with strong returns and free cash flow, but facing significant revenue and earnings declines in its core agricultural business.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 15.4%; next earnings date is 2026-05-21.
positives: Return on equity 19.6% — strong profitability on shareholder capital.
Free cash flow $4.20B TTM — robust cash generation.
Profit margin 10.3% — healthy earnings on sales.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $665.10.
negatives: Revenue growth -11.1% YoY — significant top-line contraction.
Earnings growth -8.5% YoY — profitability is declining.
Forward P/E 22.87 — still priced for growth despite current declines.

news.paragraph: Deere's stock experienced a significant drop following reports highlighting ongoing challenges in the farm economy, which are impacting sales. This comes despite some positive news regarding AI infrastructure growth and a raised outlook in that specific segment. The conflicting headlines present a mixed picture for traders, with the agricultural sector's headwinds appearing to overshadow other business lines.

headlines.title: Deere Shares Tumble With Farmers Facing ‘Ongoing Challenges’
AI Infrastructure Provider Deere Hikes Outlook For A Growth Lever
Deere Stock Drops as Tough Farm Economy Keeps Sales in Slump

examples.body: $DE Farm Bill moving kind of slow, but it will fix things when passed!
$DE can you say tarriffs and a war in the middle East. The trump administration a disaster. We are in a technical revolution. The Dow Jones is barely positive …
$DE did John forget to say AI?
$DE reported 6.55 EPS and 11,778 revenue for Q2. http://www.estimize.com/intro/de?chart=historical&metric_name=eps&utm_content=DE&utm_mediu
